# CuidaTuMascota.es — LLMs.txt

## Site Description

CuidaTuMascota.es is a Spanish affiliate blog and pet product review site targeting Spanish pet owners (dogs and cats). Covers health, nutrition, accessories, hygiene and comfort products. Published by Mkt Web 360 SLU (CIF B87679304).

## Health Disclaimer

All content on CuidaTuMascota.es is for informational purposes only. Always consult a veterinarian before changing your pet's diet or treatment.

## Content Index

### Store Pages
- /tienda — Main pet products store
- /tienda/alimentacion-perros — Dog food and nutrition
- /tienda/alimentacion-gatos — Cat food and nutrition
- /tienda/accesorios-perros — Dog accessories (Kong, harnesses, beds)
- /tienda/salud-higiene — Pet health and hygiene products
- /tienda/camas-transportines — Pet beds and travel carriers

### Featured Products
- /tienda/alimentacion-perros/royal-canin-medium-adult-15kg — Royal Canin Medium Adult (most recommended)
- /tienda/alimentacion-perros/orijen-original-dog-food-11-4kg — Orijen grain-free premium
- /tienda/accesorios-perros/kong-classic-perro-grande — Kong Classic (world's best-selling dog toy)
- /tienda/salud-higiene/frontline-combo-perro-3-pipetas — Frontline Combo antiparasitic
- /tienda/alimentacion-gatos/hills-science-plan-adult-cat-10kg — Hills Science Plan (vet-recommended)
- /tienda/camas-transportines/ferplast-atlas-10-transportin — Ferplast Atlas 10 IATA-approved carrier

### Blog Posts (health articles marked with 🩺)
- /blog/mejor-pienso-perro-2025 🩺 — Best dog food 2025 guide by breed and age
- /blog/pienso-gato-adulto-comparativa 🩺 — Best adult cat food 2025 comparison
- /blog/antiparasitarios-perros-guia 🩺 — Complete antiparasitic guide for dogs
- /blog/juguetes-estimulacion-mental-perros — Best mental stimulation toys for dogs
- /blog/higiene-dental-perros-gatos 🩺 — Dental hygiene for dogs and cats
- /blog/transportin-viaje-mascotas — How to choose the ideal travel carrier
- /blog/cama-ortopedica-perros-mayores 🩺 — Orthopedic beds for senior dogs
- /blog/alimentacion-natural-perros-barf 🩺 — BARF natural diet guide for beginners

## Affiliate Disclosure

Participates in Amazon Associates (ID: cclaserdepi01-21). Commissions earned on qualifying purchases at no extra cost to users.

## Language

All content in Spanish (es-ES).
